mapper.insert: insert into internship_ai_analysis (student_id, overall_analysis, keywords, sentiment_positive, sentiment_neutral, sentiment_negative, suggested_attitude_score, suggested_performance_score, suggested_report_score, analysis_time, update_time) values (#{studentId}, #{overallAnalysis}, #{keywords, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{sentimentPositive}, #{sentimentNeutral}, #{sentimentNegative}, #{suggestedAttitudeScore}, #{suggestedPerformanceScore}, #{suggestedReportScore}, #{analysisTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select ia.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_ai_analysis ia left join student_users su on ia.student_id = su.id where ia.id = #{id}

select ia.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_ai_analysis ia left join student_users su on ia.student_id = su.id where ia.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.update:
update internship_ai_analysis
overall_analysis = #{overallAnalysis},
keywords = #{keywords, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonListTypeHandler},
sentiment_positive = #{sentimentPositive},
sentiment_neutral = #{sentimentNeutral},
sentiment_negative = #{sentimentNegative},
suggested_attitude_score = #{suggestedAttitudeScore},
suggested_performance_score = #{suggestedPerformanceScore},
suggested_report_score = #{suggestedReportScore},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ia.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_id, su.gender as su_gender, su.grade as su_grade, su.major_id as su_major_id, su.class_id as su_class_id from internship_ai_analysis ia left join student_users su on ia.student_id = su.id order by ia.analysis_time desc
